title: ARTE: Automated Generation of Realistic Test Inputs for Web APIs
author: Anonymous
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Approach for the automated extraction of realistic test data for web APIs from knowledge bases like DBPedia. Specifically, ARTE leverages the specification of the API parameters to automatically search for realistic test inputs using natural language processing, search-based and knowledge extraction techniques.
steps_raw: Approach for the automated extraction of realistic test data for web APIs from knowledge bases like DBPedia. Specifically, ARTE leverages the specification of the API parameters to automatically search for realistic test inputs using natural language processing, search-based and knowledge extraction techniques.
